title: ZENO Christmas Wreath for Front Door | 60cm Snowy Pinecone Wreath With Red Berries and Ribbon | Outdoor Decorations
features: ELEGANT 60CM CHRISTMAS WREATH - Features snow-dusted pinecones, red berries, and a festive ribbon, making it ideal for creating a bold and festive display.
LUXURIOUS AND TRADITIONAL DESIGN - Adds a touch of classic holiday elegance to your home with its vibrant colours and intricate details.
SUITABLE FOR LARGE SPACES - Perfect for front doors, walls, and large windows, this generously sized wreath creates a grand and festive impression.
BUILT TO LAST ALL SEASON - Made with weather-resistant materials, it retains its beauty indoors or outdoors, even in winter conditions.
QUICK AND EASY SETUP - Comes pre-assembled and ready to hang, ensuring a seamless decorating experience during the busy festive period.
description: Product Description Handmade Wreath All of our wreaths are 100% handmade with red berries, pine needles and pine cones. Each wreath is carefully crafted with lots of love by designers! It adds a welcoming Christmas festival feeling to your home. Easy To Set Up The Christmas themed door wreath is super easy to set up. Find your perfect place to put it, either doorways, hallways and attach it to a wreath hook, it is as simple as that! It welcomes the Christmas holiday theme to your home. Wide Use Case Our wreaths can be used as great Christmas gifts. Furthermore, the winter wreaths can be a great piece of decoration for your front door, mantel, window, bedroom, fireplace, staircase, balcony and even garden!
